# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with 3 Roles - Deployment, Operations and Reader for CI/CD Pipeline to grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can also create any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments via Bicep or ARM Template
parameters:
- name: servicePrincipalNamePrefix  # Replace with your prefix for Service Principals (i.e., 'SP') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
- name: subscriptionId               # Subscription ID where all these services should exist or will be created for example VLNet1  (i.e., 'SubCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
- name: location                     # Specify your resource group or specific region where these services should exist (i.e., 'eastus') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
resources: 
- name: servicePrincipal               # Define a Service Principal Resource for creating Permissions   (i.e., 'ServiceCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  type: Microsoft.Authorization/servicePrincipals    # Define resource provider for creating permissions (i.e., 'ARM') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  apiVersion: 2018-09-01   # Define resource provider version (i.e., 'ARM') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  properties: {}                   # This block is empty which will have all default permissions set for Service Principals (i.e., 'ServiceCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
- name: roleAssignment               # Define a Role Assignments Resource for granting Permissions   (i.e., 'RoleCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments    # Define resource provider for granting permissions (i.e., 'ARM') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  apiVersion: 2018-09-01   # Define resource provider version (i.e., 'ARM') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  properties: {                  # This block contains permissions for Role Assignments Resource   (i.e., 'RoleCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest   
      scope: "/subscriptions/[[SUBSCRIPTIONID]]"               # Subscription ID where these permissions should exist or will be created for example VLNet1  (i.e., 'SubCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
      roleDefinitionName: "Deployment Contributor"               # Specify Role Definition Name for Granting Permissions   (i.e., 'RoleCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
      principalId: "[ServicePrincipalID]"                        # Specify Principle ID of Service Account for Granting Permissions   (i.e., 'SP') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
  }                               # This block is empty which will have all default permissions set for Role Assignments Resource (i.e., 'RoleCont') if you want to use them instead and ensure uniqueness across the organization in terms that aren't used by any existing Azure resources, e.g.: ARM_SpTest
